displayTitle: Legends Epic Collection: The Empire Volume 1
synopsis: Collects Star Wars: Republic (2002) #78-80; Star Wars: Purge, Purge – Seconds To Die, Purge – The Hidden Blade One-shots; Star Wars: Purge – The Tyrant’s Fist #1-2; Star Wars: Darth Vader and the Lost Command #1-5; and Star Wars: Dark Times #1-5
title: Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Empire Volume 1
